focus: State-authority hardening P2 implementation and task tracking

Implemented control-panel API expectedVersion checks and conflict response with latest state
Updated frontend save path to send expectedVersion and recover from 409 conflicts
Added integration tests for state metadata and expectedVersion concurrency
Added dedicated phase tracker entries and advanced plan status

suggested_next_prompt: Continue P2 completion audit: list all control-mutating endpoints and ensure each returns authoritative state metadata where contract-appropriate, then start P3 request-order guards in useAppData polling flows.
